# daytona_volume_by_name (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona persistent volume by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_volume_by_name" "example" {
  name = "workspace-cache"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Daytona volume name.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Volume creation timestamp.
- `error_reason` (String) Volume error reason, when available.
- `id` (String) Daytona volume ID.
- `last_used_at` (String) Volume last-used timestamp, when available.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the volume.
- `state` (String) Current volume state.
- `updated_at` (String) Volume update timestamp.
